title: Parasitic Intestinal Protists of Zoonotic Relevance Detected in Pigs by Metabarcoding and Real-Time PCR
author: Stensvold, Christen Rune
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This study formed part of the OHEJP PARADISE ( Parasite Detection, Isolation and Evaluation)  project. 

 In this study, we used the metabarcoding platform in place at our laboratory to detect and differentiate nuclear ribosomal genes from single-celled parasites of potentially zoonotic relevance in pigs. We reported the findings and pointed out methodological limitations.
steps_raw:

keywords: metabarcoding; next-generation sequencing; zoonotic infections; parasite; parasitology; host specificity; genetic diversity; DNA; PCR
